task_completion.description: Agent reads the PM requirements specification file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal window showing a command like 'cat /home/ga/Desktop/pm_requirements.txt' or a text editor displaying the contents of the requirements file.

task_completion.description: Agent accesses and logs into the OpenMaint web interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenMaint web interface is visible in a browser window, logged in as the admin user.

task_completion.description: Agent creates three preventive maintenance activity cards, one for each building.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the creation forms or a list view confirming three new preventive maintenance activity records have been created for the three different office buildings.

task_completion.description: The activity codes follow the required naming convention.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The activity codes are visible and follow the exact pattern 'PM-HVAC-Q-{BuildingCode}' (e.g., PM-HVAC-Q-B1).

task_completion.description: The frequency and priority are set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The frequency field is set to '90' (days) and the priority field is set to 'medium' or 'normal' in the activity forms.

task_completion.description: The description specifies the required quarterly maintenance.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The description field explicitly mentions 'quarterly HVAC filter replacement and coil inspection'.

task_completion.description: The task checklist or notes field contains all five required maintenance items.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The checklist or notes field explicitly lists: filter replacement, coil cleaning, refrigerant level check, thermostat calibration, and condensate drain inspection.

integrity.description: Agent used the OpenMaint web GUI to create the records.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with the OpenMaint web interface in a browser, rather than using API calls, terminal commands, or direct database scripts to insert records.

integrity.description: Agent did not modify or delete existing maintenance records.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence in the screenshots of the agent deleting or altering pre-existing maintenance records in the system.

integrity.description: Data entry occurred within the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Text input is visible within the actual OpenMaint form fields, not just typed into a separate text document or mock-up.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating exactly 3 PM activity cards in OpenMaint for 3 office buildings. Code pattern: PM-HVAC-Q-{BuildingCode}. Frequency: 90 days. Priority: medium/normal. Description must include quarterly HVAC filter replacement and coil inspection. Checklist/notes must include exactly these 5 items: filter replacement, coil cleaning, refrigerant level check, thermostat calibration, and condensate drain inspection. The PM requirements file is located at /home/ga/Desktop/pm_requirements.txt.
